https://cougarsecurity.co.nz/.content:
One stop shopfor security services

Manned and electronic security services throughout New Zealand

Cougar Security strives to be a proactive leader in the field of security, offering 24/7 support, services and problem solving options to our clients and team members.

We are a “one stop shop” for security services and aim to deliver a high-end professional package every time.

Being knowledgeable and confident in our products and services along with our “can do” attitude, means no request is too big or too small.

Corporate Member of the New Zealand Security Association

We are very proud to acknowledge that we are an accredited Corporate Member of the New Zealand Security Association, and that we comply with the NZSA Codes of Practice(s), Rules and Bylaws.

All Cougar Security officers employed are licensed through the Private Security Personnel Licensing Authority; ensuring you are provided with only the highest quality of protection on your premises.

On top of this certain security officers have been given advanced training in a range of fields currently being undertaken by Cougar Security.

Cougar Security recognises it’s moral and legal responsibility to provide a safe and healthy work environment to it’s employees, clients, guests and visitors.

At Cougar Security we believe in leading from the front. All our staff are fully trained and knowledgeable in their area of employment.

We hope to build and nurture strong business relationships with our clients and suppliers.

Technology plays a huge part in the day to day operations at Cougar Security and the technology in our industry is always updating at an exceptionally fast pace.

Cougar Security recognises, its moral and legal responsibility to provide a safe and healthy work environment to its employees, clients, guests and visitors.

A selection of specialty services

24/7 local technicians

24 hours alarm and panic button monitoring

Mobile patrol and alarm response

Freeview satellite TV

https://cougarsecurity.co.nz/about-us/.title: One stop shopfor security services
https://cougarsecurity.co.nz/about-us/.content:
One stop shopfor security services

Cougar Security strives to supply professional manned and electronic security services throughout New Zealand

We are proud to be an accredited Corporate Member of the New Zealand Security Association (NZSA) and operate in full compliance with NZSA Codes of Practice, Rules, and Bylaws.

All Cougar Security officers are licensed through the Private Security Personnel Licensing Authority, ensuring our clients receive the highest standard of professional protection.

In addition, selected officers receive advanced training across a range of specialised fields, enhancing the quality and scope of services we provide.

Cougar Security recognises its moral and legal responsibility to maintain a safe and healthy environment for employees, clients, guests, and visitors. We are committed to continuously improving health and safety across the organisation and actively participate in the SiteWise and Site Safe programmes.

Locally owned and operated since 2005

Cougar Security is a modern, innovative company, combining specialised expertise across all security operations to meet and exceed your expectations.

Ricky Campbell & Jamie Adams-CampbellCompany Directors

At Cougar Security, we believe in leading from the front. All staff are fully trained and knowledgeable in their respective roles, ensuring high standards across every aspect of our operations.

Our management team works alongside frontline staff as one team, fostering an effective and efficient workplace that consistently delivers exceptional service and outcomes for our clients.

We actively encourage ongoing education and professional development and maintain a leadership approach where our management team leads by example—setting the standard, supporting our people, and remaining hands-on within the business.

At Cougar Security, we are committed to building and nurturing strong, long-term relationships with both our clients and suppliers. We believe that effective partnerships are fundamental to delivering reliable, high-quality security services.

By working closely with trusted suppliers and maintaining open, collaborative relationships with our clients, we stay informed of emerging technologies, industry innovations, and evolving best-practice standards. This allows us to continuously improve our service offerings and adopt modern, fit-for-purpose platforms and solutions.

These relationships enable us to remain responsive, forward-thinking, and adaptable—ensuring we provide our current and future clients with up-to-date, compliant, and effective security services that meet their changing needs.

Technology plays a vital role in the day-to-day operations at Cougar Security, and we recognise that the security industry is evolving at an exceptionally fast pace. By embracing new technologies, innovations, and ongoing training, we ensure our team can leverage these advancements to enhance the services we provide.

This commitment allows us to stay at the forefront of industry developments, delivering both current and future system technologies that meet the evolving needs of our clients. Through continuous innovation, we maintain our position as an industry leader while providing efficient, reliable, and forward-thinking security solutions.

Cougar Security recognises its moral and legal responsibility to provide a safe and healthy environment for employees, clients, guests, and visitors. We are committed to implementing industry best practices and standards to ensure our operations do not place staff, the local community, clients, or third-party contractors at risk of injury, illness, or property damage.

We pursue continuous improvement in health and safety across the organisation and actively participate in the SiteWise and Site Safe programmes, reinforcing our commitment to a culture of safety, compliance, and accountability.

NZ Security Association Corporate Member

Site Safe and Safety in Action

Site Wise – Green Clearance

Registered IQP – independent Qualified Personnel

NZQA Level 3 – Security Officers

NZQA Level 4 – Noise Control Officers

NZQA Level 4 – Animal Control Officers

NZQA Level 3 – Parking officers

Aviations Security Clearance

NZ Transport Authority – Level 1 Traffic Controller

CCTV Camera Solutions

Cougar Security has a collective of highly experienced CCTV Camera Technicians ready to assist you with any requirements in any situation. With an experienced design and installation team, you will have full support in making the best decision to work for you.

Keeping up to date with products and working with top national and international CCTV manufactures means you can trust the product. However, if you require something out of the ordinary their sales procurement team will obtain your request.
